title: Replace Student Vibe logo with graduation cap emblem image

requirements.summary: Replace the current logo image file with the newly uploaded graduation cap emblem image in the frontend assets directory
acceptanceCriteria: The graduation cap emblem image is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png
The image displays correctly in the app header Layout component
The image displays correctly in the SplashScreen component
The image maintains proper dimensions and aspect ratio across all logo locations

file_operations.description: Save the graduation cap emblem image from Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg as logo.dim_200x200.png. This image will be used as the new Student Vibe logo throughout the application, replacing the existing logo image.

requirements.summary: Update all logo image references in Layout.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path
acceptanceCriteria: Layout component header displays the graduation cap emblem
Logo is properly sized and positioned in the navigation header
Logo remains responsive on mobile and desktop viewports

file_operations.description: Update the logo image reference in the Layout header to use the graduation cap emblem at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_200x200.png. Ensure the image src attribute points to the correct path and that the logo maintains proper sizing and positioning in both desktop and mobile navigation headers without modifying the header structure or navigation menu.

requirements.summary: Update the logo image reference in SplashScreen.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path
acceptanceCriteria: SplashScreen displays the graduation cap emblem during app startup
Logo animation effects remain functional with the new image
Logo is properly centered and sized in the splash screen

file_operations.description: Update the logo image reference in the SplashScreen component to use the graduation cap emblem at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_200x200.png. Ensure the image src attribute points to the correct path while preserving all existing animation logic, timing, and centering behavior without modifying the animation phases or onComplete callback.
